notes: All 7 sites returned HTTP 403. This is consistent with CDN/bot-protection blocking the WebFetch tool's IP/user-agent rather than actual site downtime. The texpolls.com response included 'x-deny-reason: host_not_allowed' confirming CDN-level blocking. SSL checks could not be completed (no outbound network access from bash in this environment). Recommend manual verification before treating as true downtime.
